summary: Implemented a repo-local provider adapter kernel and CLI that convert API-compatible local fixtures into provider evidence with raw output ref/digest, parsed output, parser schema version, adapter version, drift status, and zero-cost facts. Forced drift fixture is covered by tests.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate G provider adapter review. Keep real provider credentials/calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, and production side effects out of scope.
notes: Provider adapter used only local fixtures and expected_cost_usd 0.0.
Drifted provider output is valid evidence but not authorization-sensitive output.
